title: On the Silence of Holy Saturday
subtitle: Between the death of God and the resurrection lies a day the Church has rarely known how to observe. What does it mean to wait in that silence?
author: Jane Holloway
excerpt: Between the death of God and the resurrection lies a day the Church has rarely known how to observe. What does it mean to wait in that silence?

title: Beauty and the Broken World
subtitle: How Christian aesthetics holds together the goodness of creation and the reality of suffering without collapsing either into sentimentality or despair.
author: Thomas Aurelius Webb
excerpt: How Christian aesthetics holds together the goodness of creation and the reality of suffering.

title: Advent and the Discipline of Waiting
subtitle: In a culture of immediacy, the season of Advent calls the Church to something countercultural: to wait, and to wait well.
author: Claire Dunnington
excerpt: In a culture of immediacy, the season of Advent calls the Church to something countercultural: to wait, and to wait well.
